Common.portfolioNote: All records are fictional sample data created for portfolio presentation.

Landing.title: Manage textile operations with the clarity of a real internal product.
Landing.description: FabricLog is a bilingual SaaS demo for textile businesses, bringing customers, catalog, orders, invoices, payments, and reporting into one polished operations workspace.
Landing.highlightsTitle: Designed to feel like a complete operations product

highlights.customers: Customer portfolio, regional accounts, and collection visibility
highlights.inventory: Fabric catalog with stock pressure, reservations, and pricing
highlights.orders: Order pipeline from sampling to dispatch with delivery targets
highlights.finance: Invoice and payment tracking with realistic summaries

Landing.safetyDescription: No secrets, no production services, no personal data. Every company, contact, order, and transaction in this demo is fictional.

Shell.subtitle: FabricLog workspace
Shell.workspaceSummary: Customers, products, orders, invoicing, payments, and reporting are connected inside one public-safe demo workspace.
Shell.workspaceNote: Mock data, mock auth, and portfolio-safe records only.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.description: Monitor customers, order flow, invoicing, and collection pressure from one textile operations overview.

metrics.customersHint: Active fictional accounts across atelier, hospitality, interiors, and tailoring segments.
metrics.ordersHint: Seeded orders currently tracked across the showcase pipeline.
metrics.invoicesHint: Issued demo invoices connected to the current order portfolio.
metrics.revenueHint: Booked from the current seeded invoice ledger.
metrics.unpaidInvoicesHint: Pending, partial, and overdue invoices still requiring follow-up.

visualSummary.title: Revenue snapshot
visualSummary.description: Monthly booked revenue with a compact view of current collection and stock pressure.

charts.revenueDescription: Monthly booked revenue and invoice volume

statusIndicators.title: Quick status indicators
statusIndicators.description: Watch the areas that need the most operational attention in the current mock portfolio.

recentOrders.title: Recent orders
recentOrders.description: Latest order movement across the seeded customer book.

recentInvoices.title: Recent invoices
recentInvoices.description: Newest invoice items with due dates, paid values, and collection status.

activity.title: Recent activity
activity.description: Operational changes generated from the seeded order, invoice, payment, and stock timeline.

order_ready.title: Order ready
order_ready.description: {orderCode} for {customerName} is ready for dispatch planning.

Customers.title: Customers
Customers.description: Review customer accounts, contact points, invoice pressure, and payment health from one polished portfolio view.
Customers.searchPlaceholder: Search name, company, email, or region
Customers.emptyStateDescription: Try clearing a filter or broadening the search terms.
Customers.featuredDescription: {name} oversees a recurring demand mix focused on {collection}.

cards.totalAccountsHint: Balanced between signature hospitality, tailoring, and studio buyers.
cards.followUpCustomersHint: Customers with pending or partial invoices that need collection attention.

healthPanel.title: Customer health
healthPanel.description: A compact snapshot of account distribution, overdue pressure, and the most exposed featured relationship.

cards.growthCustomersHint: Accounts with room to deepen repeat order activity.
cards.overdueCustomersHint: Accounts currently carrying overdue invoice exposure.
cards.followUpCustomersHint: Customers with pending or partial balances still in motion.

Fabrics.title: Fabrics
Fabrics.description: Track popular textiles, stock position, and reservation pressure across the catalog.

Products.title: Products
Products.description: Review the textile catalog with pricing, stock pressure, and availability signals in one polished inventory view.
Products.searchPlaceholder: Search SKU, product, category, or color
Products.emptyStateDescription: Try clearing the current search or filters to reveal the full demo assortment.

cards.totalProductsHint: Active textile references currently presented in the showcase catalog.
cards.totalStockHint: Current stock position across the full seeded product assortment.
cards.reservedStockHint: Committed to current order flow, approvals, and sampling requests.
cards.lowStockCountHint: Catalog lines that should be monitored for replenishment first.

panel.title: Catalog watch
panel.description: Track the references carrying the most reservation pressure and where the assortment is tightening.
panel.featuredDescription: {name} is carrying the highest current reservation pressure in the demo catalog and should stay on the replenishment radar.
panel.categoryBreakdownDescription: The strongest reservation pressure is concentrated in these seeded product groups.

Orders.title: Orders
Orders.description: Review the live order book from new requests through production and dispatch.
Orders.searchPlaceholder: Search order, customer, product, or invoice
Orders.emptyStateDescription: Try clearing the current search or filters to restore the full seeded order book.

cards.totalOrdersHint: Seeded operational orders currently tracked across the showcase pipeline.
cards.liveOrderValueHint: Total seeded order portfolio currently tracked in the demo.
cards.inProductionHint: Orders actively moving through cutting and finishing.
cards.billingFollowUpHint: Orders still waiting on invoice completion or settlement progress.

panel.title: Operations focus
panel.description: Track which orders need production attention, dispatch coordination, and billing follow-up.
panel.featuredDescription: {reference} for {customer} currently sits closest to active operations follow-up in the seeded order book.

cards.inProductionHint: Orders currently moving through cutting, finishing, and QA preparation.
cards.readyToDispatchHint: Orders positioned for outbound scheduling and final shipment coordination.
cards.billingFollowUpHint: Orders still carrying an open billing task or missing invoice coverage.

Invoices.title: Invoices
Invoices.description: Stay ahead of due dates, overdue exposure, and receivables follow-up from one finance operations view.
Invoices.emptyStateDescription: Try clearing the current search or payment filter to reveal the full receivables ledger.

cards.totalInvoicesHint: Issued demo invoices currently linked across the seeded customer portfolio.
cards.openInvoiceValueHint: Outstanding receivables across pending, partial, and overdue invoices.
cards.overdueExposureHint: Receivables already beyond their expected due date.

panel.title: Collections focus
panel.description: Keep the most urgent receivables in view while tracking the current mix of unpaid, pending, and overdue invoices.
panel.featuredDescription: {customer} currently sits at the top of the receivables watchlist in the demo ledger.

cards.unpaidHint: Partially collected invoices that still need direct settlement follow-up.
cards.pendingHint: Issued invoices that are active but not yet collected.
cards.overdueHint: The most urgent receivables already past their due dates.

Payments.title: Payments
Payments.description: Review payment timing, settlement methods, and open invoice exposure from one polished finance operations surface.
Payments.emptyStateDescription: Try clearing the current search or filters to reveal the full seeded payments ledger.

cards.totalPaymentsHint: Settlement records currently logged across the seeded invoice portfolio.
cards.collectedPaymentsHint: Seeded receipts already logged against the invoice portfolio.
cards.bankTransfersHint: Primary settlement channel used in the fictional dataset.
cards.partialReceiptsHint: Receipts that still leave open exposure on the linked invoice.

panel.title: Settlement focus
panel.description: Keep the most operationally relevant settlement in view while scanning payment mix and remaining invoice exposure.
panel.featuredDescription: {customer} still has follow-up visibility tied to {invoiceId} in the current demo ledger.

cards.cardSettlementsHint: Payments processed through the seeded card settlement path.
cards.wireTransfersHint: Higher-value payments settled through direct transfer.
cards.settledPaymentsHint: Payments already marked fully closed in the ledger.

Reports.title: Reports
Reports.description: Review a portfolio-ready reporting snapshot for revenue, collections, order movement, and customer performance.

cards.totalRevenueHint: Booked from the seeded invoice ledger across the current reporting period.
cards.collectionRateHint: Current recovery pace based on paid amounts against billed revenue.
cards.overdueExposureHint: Receivables already past due and most likely to need active follow-up.
cards.activeOrdersHint: Orders still moving through sampling, production, ready, or dispatch preparation.

revenue.title: Revenue trend
revenue.description: Monthly billed revenue from the demo invoice portfolio.

breakdowns.paymentsDescription: Compare invoice counts with current open or settled value by payment status.
breakdowns.ordersDescription: Track where current order value is concentrated across the fulfillment pipeline.

highlights.customersDescription: Top accounts by invoiced value in the current mock reporting set.
highlights.ordersDescription: Highest-value live orders currently shaping the seeded operations mix.

notes.title: Reporting notes
notes.description: A compact operations note panel that makes the showcase feel complete without overbuilding analytics.
notes.panelDescription: The current reporting surface is intentionally compact, but the layout is ready for richer exports, cohort tracking, and inventory performance views.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: Review the demo workspace profile, language support, and interface defaults that make FabricLog feel like a polished internal product.

cards.activeLocaleHint: English stays the default language, with Azerbaijani supported across the main interface.
cards.interfaceModeHint: Preference surfaces stay intentionally lightweight and can gain persistence later without a layout rewrite.
cards.workspaceStateHint: Every profile, order, invoice, and payment record in this workspace is fictional.

profile.title: Profile and workspace
profile.description: A fictional operator profile that anchors the public demo without using any real business identity.
profile.name: Ayla Mammadli
profile.summary: Oversees customer follow-up, invoice visibility, and product availability across the seeded textile portfolio.

language.title: Language preference
language.description: The shell already uses locale-aware routing and shared message files, so language switching stays consistent across the demo.
language.switcherDescription: Use the same locale control shown in the app header to switch the current route between English and Azerbaijani.
language.supportNote: The existing message structure is already ready for future language additions without changing page layouts.

localeCards.enDescription: Default language for the portfolio demo and main product copy.
localeCards.azDescription: Fully supported across navigation, dashboards, tables, and page summaries.

preferences.title: UI preferences
preferences.description: Lightweight demo defaults that show how a fuller settings surface can grow without overloading the page.

density.title: Layout density
density.description: Uses the current spacing system for clear, recruiter-friendly readability.

statusVisibility.title: Status visibility
statusVisibility.description: Operational badges and cues stay visible across tables and summary panels.

summaryMode.title: Summary emphasis
summaryMode.description: KPI cards and overview panels are tuned for quick business scanning.

about.title: App info
about.description: A short product snapshot that explains what FabricLog demonstrates in the public showcase.
about.summary: FabricLog is a bilingual textile operations demo covering customers, catalog, orders, invoices, and reporting in one consistent SaaS workspace.

disclaimer.title: Demo disclaimer
disclaimer.description: Clear portfolio context for anyone reviewing the project.
disclaimer.body: All records in FabricLog are fictional sample data created for interface and architecture demonstration.

items.customers: No real customer or supplier data is used anywhere in the demo.
items.finance: No real invoices, payments, credentials, or accounting integrations are connected.
items.controls: The page models a realistic SaaS settings experience without exposing production controls.

CustomerDetail.description: Review account health, recent orders, invoices, and activity for {contact} in {region}.

hero.description: This demo account is currently centered around {collection} and is presented with realistic billing and follow-up context.

cards.totalOrdersHint: Current seeded relationship volume across the account.
cards.totalInvoicedHint: All linked invoice value issued to this customer.
cards.outstandingBalanceHint: Open receivables still requiring collection attention.
cards.lastActivityHint: Most recent customer-facing movement in the demo timeline.

NotFound.title: Record not found
NotFound.description: The requested FabricLog record could not be found in the current public demo dataset.
NotFound.emptyDescription: The link may be outdated or the record may not exist in the seeded showcase data anymore.

ErrorPage.title: Something went wrong
ErrorPage.description: FabricLog hit an unexpected issue while rendering this public demo view.
ErrorPage.emptyTitle: The page could not be completed.
ErrorPage.emptyDescription: Try reloading this screen or return to the dashboard to continue exploring the demo.

primary.title: Priority collection window
primary.description: Two partial invoices are due within the next five business days. A quick follow-up keeps the monthly collection rate above target.

secondary.title: Reserve planning
secondary.description: Premium jacquard and linen references are seeing the heaviest reservation pressure. Replenishment should focus there first.

Auth.title: Access the FabricLog operations workspace
Auth.description: Use the shared demo account to review the protected customer, catalog, order, invoice, payment, and reporting flow inside FabricLog.

fields.emailDescription: Use the shared demo email shown below.
fields.passwordDescription: Enter the demo password to create the mock session.

errors.invalidCredentials: The demo credentials did not match. Use the shared account details shown on this page.

credentials.title: Shared credentials
credentials.description: These fixed credentials are safe to publish and are intended for recruiters, reviewers, and portfolio walkthroughs.

howItWorks.title: How demo access works
howItWorks.description: FabricLog uses one fictional account and a simple HttpOnly cookie session so the sign-in flow feels realistic without adding production auth complexity.

form.title: Sign in
form.description: This lightweight auth flow protects the internal app pages while keeping the public landing page open.
form.footer: This is a mock authentication flow only. No real identity provider, database, or production credentials are used anywhere in the project.
